name: EdwCustSvcRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte_src_facets AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, MAX(LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_CUST_SVC_DRVR WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD ), cte_src_nps AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, MAX(LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_CUST_SVC_DRVR WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'NPS' GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD ), cte_funnel AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_src_facets UNION SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_src_nps ), cte_transform AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, 'CUSTSVC' AS SUBJ_CD, 'IDS' AS TRGT_SYS_CD, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS RUN_CYC_NO, 'Y' AS EDW_LOAD_IN FROM cte_funnel ) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS T JOIN cte_transform X ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = X.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = X.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = X.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO <= X.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Annotations:
JobName: EdwCustSvcRunCycUpd_EE
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Customer Service  Run Cycle Extract & Load Indicator Update
Get list of source systems and the maximum run cycles for the source system from the driver table.
